title: iBlot2--CHEM 584
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"39vff","text":"Transferring your proteins from your SDS-PAGE gel to a nitrocellulose membrane for western blot is quick and straightforward.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"40bfc","text":"You should not touch your gel or membrane without gloves to avoid transferring protein from your fingers to your gel or blot.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Watch the video about setting up and running your transfer to nitrocellulose at the following link: https://videos.thermofisher.com/detail/video/6059971760001/how-to-perform-a-western-blot-dry-transfer-using-the-invitrogen-iblot-2-dry-blotting-system
